HomePage.metaTitle: Roblox calculators, codes & fair trade tools

AboutPage.metaDescription: Independent Roblox tools: community codes & tier lists for trades/upgrades; accuracy depends on inputs & sources. Contact, privacy & terms on About.
AboutPage.title: About BloxCalc
AboutPage.subtitle: Calculators and guides for Roblox players
AboutPage.intro: Independent tools for Roblox players—compare trades, plan upgrades, and browse codes with clear numbers and fast navigation. BloxCalc is community-driven: tier lists, codes, and mechanics follow player and creator sources, so data accuracy depends on what you enter and how current those community references are. We are an independent site and not affiliated with Roblox Corporation or individual game publishers unless stated on a specific page.
AboutPage.contactNote: For general questions, feedback, or legal inquiries about this website, email us and we will do our best to respond when appropriate.

PrivacyPage.metaDescription: How BloxCalc handles data when you use our calculators, guides, and related pages.
PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy

sections.title: Overview
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy describes how BloxCalc ("we", "us") handles information in connection with this website and its features.

The site is intended as a general informational resource. It is not directed at children under 13 as a primary audience, but some Roblox-related content may interest younger users. If you are a parent or guardian and believe we have collected personal information from your child in a way that concerns you, contact us and we will work with you to address it.

sections.title: Information we may collect
paragraphs: Like most websites, servers and hosting providers may automatically process technical information when you load pages — for example IP address, approximate region, browser type, device type, timestamps, and requested URLs. We may also collect diagnostic or security logs to keep the service reliable.

Many calculators run in your browser: values you type may stay on your device unless a feature explicitly sends data to us. Do not paste secrets, passwords, or highly sensitive personal data into any form on the site.
If you email us (for example at our support address shown on the About page), we receive the contents of your message and associated metadata (such as your email address) so we can respond.

sections.title: Cookies, analytics, and third parties
paragraphs: We may use cookies or similar technologies for basic functionality, preferences (such as language), analytics, or advertising, depending on how the site is configured at a given time.

Third-party services (including analytics networks, advertising partners, content delivery networks, or embedded widgets) may collect information under their own policies. Where required, we aim to provide controls or notices consistent with applicable law.

sections.title: How we use information
paragraphs: We use the categories of information above to operate and improve the site, measure performance, protect against abuse, comply with legal obligations, and communicate with you when you contact us.

sections.title: Retention, security, and your choices
paragraphs: We retain information only as long as needed for the purposes described here, unless a longer period is required by law. No online service can guarantee perfect security, but we take reasonable steps to protect information we control.

Depending on where you live, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or restrict certain processing of personal information, or to object to certain uses. You may also be able to use browser settings to block cookies. To exercise rights or ask questions, contact us using the email on the About page.

sections.title: International transfers and changes
paragraphs: Visitors may access the site from many countries. Information may be processed in jurisdictions with different data-protection laws than your own.

We may update this policy from time to time. The "Last updated" date at the top will change when we do. Continued use of the site after changes means you accept the updated policy to the extent permitted by law.

TermsPage.metaDescription: Rules for using BloxCalc calculators, guides, and related features.
TermsPage.title: Terms of Service

sections.title: Agreement
paragraphs: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of BloxCalc and its content ("the Service"). By using the Service, you agree to these Terms and to our Privacy Policy.

If you do not agree, do not use the Service. We may change these Terms; the updated date will appear at the top of this page. Material changes may be communicated in a reasonable way where appropriate.

sections.title: The Service
paragraphs: BloxCalc provides informational tools and content related to Roblox games, including calculators, guides, and code listings where available.
Community values, codes, and game mechanics change frequently. Features may be updated, paused, or removed. We do not guarantee completeness, accuracy, or availability at any specific time.

sections.title: Not affiliated; no endorsement
paragraphs: BloxCalc is not affiliated with Roblox Corporation. Game names and trademarks belong to their respective owners. References to a game do not imply sponsorship or endorsement.
Calculator outputs depend on numbers you supply and on third-party or community lists. We do not provide in-game items, currency, or trades.

sections.title: Disclaimer of warranties
paragraphs: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, WHETHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT, TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
paragraphs: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, BLOXCALC AND ITS OPERATORS WILL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES, OR FOR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS, GOODWILL, DATA, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES, ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO YOUR USE OF THE SERVICE.

IN ANY CASE, OUR AGGREGATE LIABILITY ARISING OUT OF OR RELATING TO THE SERVICE WILL BE LIMITED TO THE GREATER OF (A) THE AMOUNT YOU PAID US FOR THE SERVICE IN THE TWELVE MONTHS BEFORE THE CLAIM (TYPICALLY ZERO FOR A FREE SITE) OR (B) FIFTY US DOLLARS (USD $50), UNLESS APPLICABLE LAW REQUIRES OTHERWISE.

sections.title: Acceptable use
paragraphs: You agree not to misuse the Service — including attempting unauthorized access, disrupting servers, scraping in a way that harms performance, or using the Service to violate law or third-party rights.
We may suspend or terminate access if we reasonably believe you violated these Terms or created risk for us or others.

sections.title: General
paragraphs: These Terms are governed by the laws applicable to the site operator's jurisdiction, without regard to conflict-of-law rules, except where prohibited by your local consumer protections.
If a provision is unenforceable, the remaining provisions remain in effect. Failure to enforce a provision is not a waiver.
Questions about these Terms? Contact us using the email listed on the About page.

GameCalculator.heading: {game} calculator
GameCalculator.lead: Compare what you give versus what you get using totals from the same community value list you trust.

AdoptMeCalculator.metaDescription: Adopt Me! trade fairness helper: enter your total value and their total value to see the gap before you confirm.
AdoptMeCalculator.intro: Paste totals from one trusted tier list for both sides. The tool only compares numbers you enter — it does not look up pets.
AdoptMeCalculator.labelYours: Total value you are trading away
AdoptMeCalculator.hint: Use the same scale for both fields (for example both in “normal” units from the same sheet).
AdoptMeCalculator.verdictEqual: These totals match — double-check ages, potions, and ride/fly before you accept.
AdoptMeCalculator.verdictYouOver: You are giving about {amount} more value on this scale — the trade favors them unless you meant to add sweeteners.
AdoptMeCalculator.verdictTheyOver: They are giving about {amount} more value on this scale — the trade favors you unless extras were agreed separately.
AdoptMeCalculator.disclaimer: Community values change daily and differ by list. This page is informational only and not affiliated with Uplift Games or Roblox.

BloxFruitsCalculator.metaDescription: Blox Fruits trade fairness helper: compare your total fruit value against theirs before you lock a trade.
BloxFruitsCalculator.intro: Enter combined values for fruits/accessories you each put in, using the same tier list for both columns.
BloxFruitsCalculator.labelYours: Total value you are trading away
BloxFruitsCalculator.hint: If you mix physical fruits and stored value, keep the units consistent with the list you follow.
BloxFruitsCalculator.verdictEqual: Totals line up on paper — still verify awakenings, levels, and any bundled items in the trade window.
BloxFruitsCalculator.verdictYouOver: You are offering roughly {amount} more on this scale — pause unless that overpay is intentional.
BloxFruitsCalculator.verdictTheyOver: They are offering roughly {amount} more on this scale — confirm nothing important is missing from the window.
BloxFruitsCalculator.disclaimer: Fruit demand shifts with patches. Numbers here are whatever you type; always confirm the final trade in-game. Not affiliated with Blox Fruits or Roblox.

SlimeRngCalculator.metaDescription: Slime RNG trade helper: compare the total value you send versus the total you receive using the same community sheet before you confirm.
SlimeRngCalculator.intro: Slime-style games rename currencies and multipliers often, but the math is the same: one total you give, one total you get, both from the same list.
SlimeRngCalculator.labelYours: Total value you are trading away
SlimeRngCalculator.hint: If your sheet uses shiny / aura / mutation multipliers, bake those into the totals before you paste them here.
SlimeRngCalculator.verdictEqual: Totals match on this scale — still verify every slot in the trade window for duped tags or mismatched tiers.
SlimeRngCalculator.verdictYouOver: You are offering about {amount} more on this scale — pause unless that overpay is deliberate.
SlimeRngCalculator.verdictTheyOver: They are offering about {amount} more on this scale — confirm no hidden requirements or off-window items.
SlimeRngCalculator.disclaimer: RNG titles rebalance hourly sometimes; community sheets disagree. This tool only echoes numbers you type and is not affiliated with any slime RNG developer or Roblox.

KickALuckyBlockCalculator.placeholderBannerTitle: Placeholder data — not synced from the live game
KickALuckyBlockCalculator.placeholderBannerBody: Zone gates, shop prices, and the kick-distance multiplier are fictional examples so the UI can ship first. After you verify numbers in Roblox, replace the rows and constants in src/config/kick-a-lucky-block/placeholder-data.ts and adjust the formula in KickALuckyBlockCalculator.tsx if needed.
KickALuckyBlockCalculator.labelCurrentPower: Current leg power (same units as zone gates)
KickALuckyBlockCalculator.hintPower: The multiplier defaults to a demo constant. Change it until on-paper distance matches what you observe in-game, then hard-code the real curve later.
KickALuckyBlockCalculator.kickFormulaNote: Formula used: distance ≈ power × multiplier. Replace with the real kick pipeline (caps, weights, buffs) when you have patch-accurate math.
KickALuckyBlockCalculator.zonesTableFoot: Gate numbers are placeholders — screenshot each door in-game and overwrite the table data.
KickALuckyBlockCalculator.weightsIntro: Sorted by lower cost per +1 power (better first). Costs and gains are invented until you paste the live shop.
KickALuckyBlockCalculator.weightsTableFoot: Efficiency is cash ÷ power gain on this placeholder scale only — not official ROI from the developer.
KickALuckyBlockCalculator.disclaimer: BloxCalc is fan-made and not affiliated with No More Flops or Roblox. Always confirm gates, prices, and kick range inside the live experience after updates.

KickALuckyBlockZones.metaTitle: Kick a Lucky Block Zones List — Power Gates (placeholder)
KickALuckyBlockZones.metaDescription: Reference table of Kick a Lucky Block zone power requirements. Rows are placeholder examples until verified in-game screenshots are merged.
KickALuckyBlockZones.zonesH1: Kick a Lucky Block zones & power gates
KickALuckyBlockZones.zonesLead: Static list of fictional zone gates for layout testing. Use the calculator to compare your typed power against the same placeholder gates, then replace the dataset with real values.
KickALuckyBlockZones.dataPlaceholderBody: Replace KALB_ZONE_ROWS in src/config/kick-a-lucky-block/placeholder-data.ts with names and power numbers copied from each zone entrance in Roblox.

GameDetail.noActiveCodes: There are no codes listed right now. Check official social channels after major updates — we refresh this block when new codes drop.
GameDetail.quickNavDescription: Jump to the calculator for this game.

MyKnifeFarm.metaHubTitle: My Knife Farm Codes & Calculator Guide
MyKnifeFarm.metaHubDescription: My Knife Farm codes, a practical guide, and links to our My Knife Farm calculator tools for upgrades ROI and zone requirements.
MyKnifeFarm.hubH1: My Knife Farm — codes, guide & calculator hub
MyKnifeFarm.hubQuickNavBody: Open the upgrade ROI calculator for best paybacks, or the zones list for gates and knife rarity odds.
MyKnifeFarm.hubLinkRoi: My Knife Farm upgrade ROI calculator (best upgrades, cash fast)
MyKnifeFarm.hubLinkZones: My Knife Farm zones list (requirements & crate knife chances)
MyKnifeFarm.metaRoiTitle: My Knife Farm Best Upgrades ROI Calculator
MyKnifeFarm.metaRoiDescription: Rank My Knife Farm upgrades by payback time and $/s per dollar to find the best upgrades and get cash fast with data-driven buys.
MyKnifeFarm.roiH1: My Knife Farm upgrade ROI calculator
MyKnifeFarm.roiLead: Compare upgrade cost to added cash per second. Shorter payback usually means faster compounding — ideal for “best upgrades” and early cash rush routes.
MyKnifeFarm.roiIntro: Rows are sorted by payback (base price ÷ Δ cash/s). Efficiency is Δ cash/s per $1,000 spent (higher is better).
MyKnifeFarm.smartIntro: ROI here is base price ÷ multiplier increase (lower is better — you pay less per +1 multiplier). The lowest-ROI upgrade is highlighted as Best value.
MyKnifeFarm.smartFootnote: Multiplier Δ is the income multiplier gain modeled for this tier. Ties pick the first item in data order.
MyKnifeFarm.metaZonesTitle: My Knife Farm Zone Requirements & Knife Rarity Chances
MyKnifeFarm.metaZonesDescription: All My Knife Farm zone gates, notable drops, and illustrative crate knife odds for planning routes around zone requirements and rarity chances.
MyKnifeFarm.zonesH1: My Knife Farm zones — requirements, drops & crate odds
MyKnifeFarm.zonesLead: Use this table to prep cash walls, key farming, and crate sessions. Percentages are planning examples — verify after each live patch.
MyKnifeFarm.dataDisclaimer: Sample / community-style numbers for UX and SEO around My Knife Farm calculator, codes, zones, and knife rarity. Confirm everything in your current game build.
MyKnifeFarm.ttgIntro: Enter your current cash and cash per second. We use each zone’s cash gate from the data above to estimate how long until you can afford the next unlocks (keys/quests are not modeled).
MyKnifeFarm.ttgNeedValidCash: Enter a valid current cash amount (0 or greater) to see your next zone targets.
MyKnifeFarm.ttgNeedValidCps: Enter a cash per second value greater than 0 to see estimated times.
MyKnifeFarm.ttgAllCashGatesMet: You already meet every listed cash gate — only keys, quests, or other locks may remain.
MyKnifeFarm.zonesSeoTableHeading: My Knife Farm zone requirements (summary for search)
MyKnifeFarm.zonesSeoTableCaption: Structured reference for My Knife Farm zone requirements, minimum cash gates, unlock conditions, notable drops, and illustrative crate knife rarity chances. Values mirror the primary table and numeric cashGoal field used by calculators.
